title: cystopteris fragilis var. dentata
intro: Cystopteris fragilis var. dentata, also known as the fragile fern or crested bladder fern, is a rare and endangered species of vascular plant belonging to the family Cystopteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its rich content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Cystopteris fragilis var. dentata include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to have antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties.
